response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates excellent software engineering fundamentals and appropriate seniority level (14+ years, multiple senior/staff roles), there is a critical gap between his current expertise and the role's core requirements. His last substantial C++ work was in 2015 (~11 years ago), and his recent career has pivoted heavily toward JavaScript/TypeScript web development. Additionally, the resume shows no evidence of industrial automation domain expertise, IoT protocols (MQTT), message brokers, or security compliance knowledge (SDL, IEC 62443) that are central to this position. He could theoretically reskill, but the gap is too large for immediate contribution.
strengths: Extensive software engineering experience (14+ years) with strong craftsmanship practices including TDD, CI/CD, and code mentorship
Demonstrated seniority with multiple Staff and Senior-level roles, including mentoring capabilities and organizing training sessions
Solid understanding of performance optimization and networked systems from microservices and low-latency backend work
concerns: C++ expertise is severely outdated; last substantial use was in 2015 (11+ years ago); recent 10 years focused on JavaScript/TypeScript web stack
No demonstrated experience with IoT, industrial automation, message brokers, MQTT, or industrial protocols (Modbus TCP/IP, IEC 61850, OPC UA)
No evidence of Security Development Lifecycle, IEC 62443 industrial cybersecurity standards, or security-first development practices
